positive: A majestic, stylized celestial fox spirit (kitsune) leaping through a vibrant, bioluminescent forest at dusk. The fox is rendered in clean, elegant silhouette with flowing, stylized fur tails and glowing runes etched across its body. Surrounding the fox are oversized, abstract glowing flora, glowing crystalline mushrooms, and swirling nebulae patterns that blend into the leaves. Composition is centered and dynamic. Strong contrast between the deep indigo/teal background and the glowing gold/electric blue highlights. Minimalist, elegant, highly saturated pop-art style, perfect for apparel screen printing, vector art aesthetics, high detail, volumetric lighting, crisp lines, fantasy illustration.
negative: blur, text, watermark, signature, logos, artifacts, ugly, bad anatomy, extra limbs, noisy, grainy, low detail, photographic, realistic, depth of field
